name: Belden Inc.
lede: Belden runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram, Pune and Ernakulam, covering engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing, built over two years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Belden office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Belden Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Belden runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Pune, Ernakulam), covering engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Belden's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram, Pune and Ernakulam, spanning engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Procurement, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Electronic Components and Accessories, Electronic Components and Accessories

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twelve decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Belden operate in India?
faq.a: Belden operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Belden have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Belden's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Gurugram, Pune and Ernakulam.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Belden run in India?
faq.a: Belden runs engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Belden's India GCCs?
faq.a: Belden's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Belden's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Belden's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
